title: Workflow Activity Catalog
description: A curated catalog of workflow activities for a named set. Activities are source-agnostic workflow primitives; provenance is attached per record, not assumed.

schema.description: Schema identity and version. Verify these before parsing.

set.description: Name of the curated set this catalog represents.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this catalog was generated.

sources.$comment: Inventory of all sources contributing activities to this catalog. Use (kind, id) as the stable key. JSON Schema cannot enforce (kind, id) uniqueness; that invariant is maintained by the transform pipeline. A conforming producer must emit at most one entry per (kind, id) pair.
sources.description: The sources from which activities in this catalog were drawn.

activities.$comment: Order is not guaranteed. Use the id field as the stable key within this file. fullName alone is not globally unique.
activities.description: All workflow activities in this set. Each activity is a source-agnostic primitive; provenance is in source.

source.description: A single contributing source. kind distinguishes the origin model.

kind.description: 'nuget-package': activities extracted from a NuGet package. 'dotnet-runtime': activities from the .NET WF4 runtime (e.g. CoreWF).

id.description: Source identifier. For nuget-package: the NuGet package id. For dotnet-runtime: the package or assembly name.

projectUrl.description: Project URL. Populated for nuget-package sources.

activity.description: A workflow primitive: a node that can be placed in a workflow graph and configured through members. Source-agnostic; provenance is in source.

id.description: Stable compound identifier: '{fullName}@{source.id}/{source.version}'. Unique within this catalog file.

displayName.description: Name shown to the user in Studio.

description.description: Short description / tooltip shown in Studio.

category.description: Activity panel category path (e.g. 'UI Automation', 'System > Workflow').

source.description: Provenance of this activity. Matches an entry in sources[].

members.$comment: Only includes members visible in Studio. Order is not guaranteed. Use name as the stable key.
members.description: The configurable members of this activity: arguments, child-activity slots, variable scopes, and plain properties.

member.description: A single configurable member of an activity. memberKind distinguishes the four WF4 member roles.

name.description: Member name as it appears in code. Stable key within members[].

displayName.description: Member name as shown in Studio.

dataType.description: The .NET type of this member. Fully namespace-qualified, C#-style generics (e.g. 'System.Activities.InArgument<System.String>'), no assembly qualification, no language aliases, no whitespace around angle brackets.

memberKind.description: WF4 semantic role. 'argument': data flows in or out via InArgument/OutArgument/InOutArgument. 'variable-scope': a Variable or Collection<Variable> scoped to this activity (e.g. Sequence.Variables). 'child': a nested Activity, ActivityAction, ActivityFunc, or collection thereof (e.g. While.Body). 'property': plain design-time configuration.

argumentDirection.description: Data flow direction. Non-null only when memberKind is 'argument'.

isRequiredArgument.description: Whether this argument must be bound before the workflow can run. Always false when memberKind is not 'argument'.
